label: Prefab scatter group
description: A weighted prefab entry within a ScatteredPrefabs group. The element name is the PrefabDef defName (the 'prefab' field); scalar text is the weight.

prefab.label: Prefab
prefab.description: PrefabDef to spawn. Populated from the XML element name by the keyedObjectList loader.

weight.label: Weight
weight.description: Relative probability of this prefab being chosen when scattering. Populated from XML scalar text by the keyedObjectList loader.

max.label: Max
max.description: Maximum number of times this prefab may be spawned. Use -1 for unlimited.

indoorRuin.label: Indoor ruin
indoorRuin.description: When true, this prefab requires the scatter cell to be inside an existing ruined structure.

filthDef.label: Filth def
filthDef.description: Filth ThingDef spawned around the placed prefab.

filthExpandBy.label: Filth expand by
filthExpandBy.description: Number of cells to expand the prefab's occupied rect when spawning filth.

filthChance.label: Filth chance
filthChance.description: Probability (0-1) that each eligible cell around the placed prefab receives filth.
